steps.how: Read full output; sessions/2026-06-12/ has today's 6 files + VPS backup success; one result line into CURSOR.md.

steps.what: RABIE approve/reverse sheet + extract all PROVISIONAL rulings
steps.how: Parse sessions/2026-06-11.jsonl (52) + 06-12.jsonl (10) into ts|item|rating|reason|box table + grep law-shaped directives (MAJORS, EVIDENCE RULE, التوأم) with line refs. [merged 2]
steps.done_note: 103 rulings sheet + 5 contradictions found incl. infra-inflation → build-rating handicap self-accepted

steps.what: Feed reversals into RABIE calibration
steps.how: ~/agents/rabie/calibrate.py with the reversal set; update calibration_results.json + agreement delta into RABIE_MIND.md.

steps.what: Orchestrator client task types: intake, profile, year_map
steps.how: orchestrator_daemon.py handle(): client_intake (manifest warnings to Mira), client_profile (build+fingerprint_status RED/YELLOW/GREEN), client_year_map (slots/anchors/cadence report). [merged 3]

steps.what: Blackout-aware render_slot task type
steps.how: Consults blackout_gate.check() first — blackout requeues with reason, NEVER flips the switch; else runs render_client_slot.

steps.what: client_full_pipeline chaining all five stages
steps.how: intake→profile→year_map→render anchors→visual_gate_checklist with per-stage Mira reports + fail-stop.

steps.what: Nightly crystallize_loop schedule + Mira report
steps.how: Orchestrator schedule or com.ogz LaunchAgent; Mira reports new DRAFT card count from data/crystallize_queue.json.

steps.what: Queue smoke test: drop a task, verify 10-second pickup
steps.how: echo client_intake task JSON into ~/agents/queue/pending/; verify move to completed/ + Mira report — Abraham never calls agent code directly.

steps.what: timeout=90 + max_retries=2 on all OpenAI callers
steps.how: Grep repo for OpenAI client constructions + raw urllib; apply repo-wide; touched files listed in commit message.

steps.what: Deprecate or regenerate the stale INDEX.json
steps.how: Grep consumers of 11_who_to_learn_from/INDEX.json (2026-05-14); none live → strengthen deprecation header; consumed → regenerate. No deletion.

steps.what: Rule on the 2 intelligence_layer backup files
steps.how: DELETE APPROVED yes/no for intelligence_layer_backup_*.json (216KB, June 8) or quarantine per locked decision #7 — deletion authority is his only.

steps.what: Staleness checks for the 4 live learn-from indexes
steps.how: guard_data_quality.py warns when accounts_index, target_accounts, content_types_canonical_index, or intelligence_layer updated_at >30d.

steps.what: Weekly archive-freshness LaunchAgent
steps.how: com.ogz pattern running check_archive_freshness.py weekly; output to Mira, not Abraham.

steps.what: Extract the 12 pending calibration-era inbox items
steps.how: Once moat passes Level 1: batch_extract.py over _extraction_queue.json (@barnscoffee et al., queued since 05-18); statuses pending→done.

steps.what: Refresh stale tier-1 benchmark accounts
steps.how: extract_new_accounts/extract_account_obs for tier-1 with raw archives >30d (Apify credits, $0 used June); obs_count_actual deltas recorded.
